Describe the sequence of actions performed by the instructor in the black tank top during the lymph massage demonstration.
canonical_answer: At 4s, five women stand on stage with the instructor in the center wearing black; at 8s, the instructor touches her neck area with her right hand; at 14s, the group raises hands with index fingers pointing up; at 18s, the instructor uses her thumb and index finger to form a V shape under her jawline.

question: Explain the specific hand gesture demonstrated and the corresponding on-screen text instructions during the first step of the massage.
canonical_answer: At 2s, text labels the activity as Step 1 Morning Lymph Massage; at 14s, the women raise their right hands with index fingers pointing upwards; at 16s, text instructs to make a V shape with thumb and index finger; at 18s, the woman in black applies this V shape under her jawline.
